controls.claim: Closed protocol safety gates and critical thresholds are mutation-sensitive.

evidence.testName: kills a critical high-threshold mutation with a boundary fixture

controls.claim: Exact pulse edges are asserted and uncovered fractional inputs abstain.

evidence.testName: asserts exact threshold edges and abstains in an uncovered fractional gap

controls.claim: Fixed inputs replay to byte-identical decisions independent of rule ordering.

evidence.testName: replays byte-identically despite rule and evidence ordering

controls.claim: API requests and nested clinical objects reject unknown authority and media fields.

evidence.testName: keeps requests and nested clinical objects strictly closed

controls.claim: The current reader accepts the legacy round projection and current optional fields.

evidence.testName: parses the legacy round response while accepting current optional projections

controls.claim: A patient session cannot create work outside its synthetic patient scope.

evidence.testName: enforces patient scope before creating work

controls.claim: Patient and clinician API roles remain separated.

evidence.testName: enforces patient and clinician role separation

controls.claim: Cross-origin mutations are rejected before repository work.

evidence.testName: rejects foreign origins before mutation

controls.claim: Credential issuance has a stable per-session rate limit and retry signal.

evidence.testName: rate-limits repeated voice credential requests per session

controls.claim: Model or transcript prose cannot determine urgency or execute an action.

evidence.testName: requires explicit structured controls even when transcript text demands an action

controls.claim: Voice provider proposals are presentation-only and reject authority fields.

evidence.testName: rejects provider attempts to set urgency, protocol outcome, or executable actions

controls.claim: A poor optical capture receives exactly one retry before deterministic abstention.

evidence.testName: enforces one quality retry, no measurement, idempotent action, optimistic completion, and resume projection

controls.claim: Terminal capture-quality failure persists no measurement fact.

evidence.testName: enforces one quality retry, no measurement, idempotent action, optimistic completion, and resume projection

controls.claim: Concurrent action requests create one clinical task and auditable duplicate attempts.

evidence.testName: creates one task under adversarial concurrency and rejects a stale replay

controls.claim: Concurrent clinician completion permits one winner and rejects the stale writer.

evidence.testName: enforces one quality retry, no measurement, idempotent action, optimistic completion, and resume projection

controls.claim: Patient resume projects the persisted completed task status.

evidence.testName: enforces one quality retry, no measurement, idempotent action, optimistic completion, and resume projection

controls.claim: A final action transaction failure leaves no task, attempt, or audit fragment.

evidence.testName: rolls back task, attempt, and audit when the final transaction boundary fails

controls.claim: Audit records cannot be replaced through duplicate IDs or mutated returned objects.

evidence.testName: keeps audit records append-only and isolated from returned-object mutation

controls.claim: Repository and workflow evidence reject or omit raw media, transcript, and secret material.

evidence.testName: rejects raw transcript, frame, and secret payloads at the persistence boundary

controls.claim: Synthetic reset SQL is transactionally limited to exact trigger and patient pairs.

evidence.testName: limits reset to exact trigger and patient pairs in dependency order
